channel.title: Posts on Complex Vector Space
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Complex Vector Space

item.title: printf("Hello, World!");
item.description: I've been meaning to officially offload some of my more structured thoughts and put into an organized, structured location. I've tried my fair share of blogging platforms and none of them really stuck, but I want to take one final shot at documenting what I'm learning and why I find it interesting.
